历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 4277 → 4182 → 4132 → 4618 → 3975, fluctuating within the 4000–4600 range overall, rebounding to approximately 3975 in 2025, showing a forward trend in recent two years; enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 127 → 127 → 133 → 128 → 134 students, with a plan of 128 students in 2026, a reduction of 6 students (-4.5%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 20th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 20–22 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier engineering powerhouses in China; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 66th), with no high-heat attention signals; no historical records of significant admission gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Instrument Science and Technology A, Optical Engineering A, Architecture A, etc., with outstanding engineering strength highly matching the enrollment categories.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., are highly recommended with high social heat, aligning with Tianjin University's Engineering Experimental Class directions; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) dropped from 422 points in 2024 to 405 points in 2025, showing a downward trend; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin City, not a local university in Hunan Province, with no special regional preference in Hunan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3975, a 4.5% reduction in enrollment plan for 2026, an approximately 8.4% increase in Physics Category examinees in Hunan Province intensifying competition, and a somewhat negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will further advance to approximately 3838, with a range of 3377–4299.
